text:
The minimalist, open room in the first scene offers me a sense of clarity and possibility, as if I’ve entered a blank slate where thoughts can flow freely or ideas can be shaped. The bean bags whisper informal ease, encouraging reflection.

The second image immerses me into an environment of curiosity and discovery. The vibrant colors and the term "R+D" (research and development) spark a sense of innovation and forward motion in me—a place where questioning and exploration are not just allowed, but celebrated.
